overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages clauses may be unenforceable under CA Civil Code §1671
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisor cannot collect pre-set damages amounts; must prove actual damages

overrides.override_summary: Post-term non-competition covenants may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be free to compete immediately after termination

overrides.override_summary: CA Business & Professional Code §§20000-20043 govern termination/non-renewal; law controls over FA
overrides.why_it_matters: State protections override FA termination provisions

overrides.override_summary: General release void under CA Civil Code §1542
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be required to waive unknown claims at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: General release at renewal/transfer must exclude claims under HI Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: HI franchise law claims preserved even through releases

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs the FA
overrides.why_it_matters: Florida choice of law overridden — IL protections apply

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside IL void; arbitration outside IL still permitted
overrides.why_it_matters: Litigation (if any) must be in IL, but arbitration can be elsewhere

overrides.override_summary: Cannot waive compliance with IL Franchise Disclosure Act
overrides.why_it_matters: IL statutory protections cannot be contracted away

overrides.override_summary: IN Deceptive Franchise Practices Act and Franchise Disclosure Law apply
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional IN-specific franchise protections

overrides.override_summary: General release does not release franchisor from MD law liability
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchise law claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: If FA not renewed, franchisor must compensate fair market value of franchise; 180 days notice for non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Significant financial protection: compensation if PDRI declines to renew

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages/termination penalties replaced with 'actual damages'
overrides.why_it_matters: Pre-set penalties unenforceable; only provable damages collectible

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination (60 days to cure); 180 days notice for non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Much longer cure period than FA's 15 days; extended non-renewal notice

overrides.override_summary: Litigation cannot be required outside Minnesota
overrides.why_it_matters: Venue protections for MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require general release at renewal/extension
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees keep their rights when renewing

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate upon any grounds available by law
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides FA 'not applicable' for franchisee termination — NY franchisees have exit rights

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration venue outside ND may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may insist on in-state arbitration

overrides.override_summary: Non-compete unreasonable if unenforceable in ND
overrides.why_it_matters: ND may invalidate post-term restrictions

overrides.override_summary: Not required to consent to liquidated damages
overrides.why_it_matters: Pre-set damage amounts unenforceable

overrides.override_summary: Venue must comply with §19-28.1-14 of RI Franchise Investment Act
overrides.why_it_matters: RI venue protections apply

overrides.override_summary: SD law governs; inconsistent provisions void
overrides.why_it_matters: FL choice of law overridden

overrides.override_summary: Termination notice provisions governed by VA law
overrides.why_it_matters: VA-specific termination protections

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration must be in WA, mutually agreed, or as determined by arbitrator
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees protected from out-of-state arbitration

overrides.override_summary: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails in conflict of laws
overrides.why_it_matters: WA law takes precedence over FL

overrides.override_summary: Release void unless negotiated settlement with independent counsel
overrides.why_it_matters: Strong protection against coerced releases

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees collectable only to extent reflecting reasonable estimated or actual costs
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits PDRI's ability to profit from transfers

overrides.override_summary: WI Fair Dealership Law (ch. 135) governs and supersedes inconsistent FA provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: Comprehensive WI dealer protection
